nasb.text: He said to them, “It is not for you to know times or epochs which the Father has fixed by His own authority;

esv.text: He said to them, “It is not for you to know times or seasons that the Father has fixed by his own authority.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“父憑著自己的權柄所定的時間或日期，你們不必知道。

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“天父照祂的权柄定下的时间、日期不是你们可以知道的。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“父凭着自己的权柄所定的时候和日期，不是你们可以知道的。
